nodes.name: ageoa.institutional_quant_engine.hierarchical_risk_parity
nodes.conceptual_summary: Grouped atoms sharing an upstream family or module.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: Replaces singleton atom subpackages with a flat module layout.

nodes.name: compute_hrp_weights
nodes.description: Computes Hierarchical Risk Parity portfolio weights by clustering assets and recursively bisecting risk along the dendrogram.
nodes.conceptual_summary: Direct callable atom in the consolidated module.
nodes.critic_notes: Signature derived from the Python wrapper definition.

nodes.name: hrppipelinerun
nodes.description: Executes the full Hierarchical Risk Parity pipeline: ingests asset return data, constructs a hierarchical clustering structure via a correlation/distance matrix, applies recursive bisection to allocate risk, and emits final portfolio weights.
nodes.conceptual_summary: Direct callable atom in the consolidated module.
nodes.critic_notes: Signature derived from the Python wrapper definition.
